data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet, exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only: #FF00FF magenta, no texture, no gradient, no floor, no shadow, no grid lines, no borders, no text.

Subject: cute Q-version melee enemy for Samsara Ascension — chibi corrupted xianxia raider, big head small body, dark red armor, tiny blade kept close, mischievous hostile expression, rounded but readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

View/framing: full body visible in each frame, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable feet/ground anchor, same body height and same scale in all four frames, subject fills about 60% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Entire subject and any weapon/hair/clothing/aura fully contained within its cell, nothing crosses cell edges.

Animation: idle cycle with real pose changes.
Top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled.
Top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders/core lift slightly, small attached aura brightens.
Bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, cloth/hair/petals/arms/weapon sway clearly.
Bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally.

Consistency: preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes/core face, costume/armor marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every frame; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change. No detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D RPG sprite animation sheet, crisp readable forms, cute but hostile, dark red corrupted xianxia raider, tiny blade held close.
